headline: How Surging Global Specialty Sales At Henry Schein (HSIC) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In February 2026, Henry Schein reported its FY2025 fourth-quarter results, with total net sales rising 7.7% year over year and Global Specialty Products sales increasing 14.6%, underscoring solid demand across its healthcare distribution and solutions portfolio. The outsized growth in Global Specialty Products highlights how Henry Schein’s higher-margin offerings are becoming an increasingly important contributor to the company’s overall performance. We’ll now examine how this strong Global...
